---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: Abhi-mishra998
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve. Example: *"As an operator, I have no way to see which OPA rules are evaluated most often, so I can't tell which policies are load-bearing."*

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see built? Be as specific as you can.

## Which component would this affect?

- [ ] Gateway / request pipeline
- [ ] OPA policy engine
- [ ] Audit chain / Merkle log
- [ ] Behavioral risk scoring
- [ ] Autonomy contracts
- [ ] Auto-Response Engine (ARE)
- [ ] Identity Graph
- [ ] Flight Recorder
- [ ] Python SDK
- [ ] React UI
- [ ] Infrastructure / deployment
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried working around this another way? What didn't work?

## Would you like to contribute a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] I can help review but not implement
- [ ] I'm just suggesting it

## Additional context

Links, references, prior art, or anything else relevant.
